Watch Live

What is the new charge for driving an electric or plug-in hybrid car?

All new cars must be electric or hybrid from 2030, but the government could put new taxes on them.
6 Jan 2026

Congestion charge for EV drivers comes into effect

Pure battery-powered EVs are no longer eligible for a 100% discount on the congestion charge.
2 Jan 2026

Ford to scale back electric vehicle plans, taking $19.5bn hit

The US carmaker is backing away from large electric vehicles, citing lacklustre demand and recent regulatory changes under US President Donald Trump.
15 Dec 2025

What changes are being made to London's transport system in 2026?

Here are details of significant planned changes across Transport for London's network that could affect passengers and drivers in the new year.
5 Jan 2026

Could Glasgow introduce free electric shuttle buses?

Six options have been assessed that would connect various parts of the city centre and make them more accessible.
5 days ago

'Important moment' as 50 electric buses join fleet

The vehicles are part of a £31.87m project to introduce greener buses to routes.
27 Dec 2025

China's BYD overtakes Tesla as world's top EV seller

It marks the first time the Chinese firm has outpaced its American rival for annual sales.
2 Jan 2026

China and Canada announce tariffs relief after a high-stakes meeting between Carney and Xi

Canola oil and electric cars are at the centre of the deal agreed by Mark Carney and Xi Jinping after years of strained ties.
2 days ago

Ambulance trust receives cash for 23 more vehicles

More than 500 ambulances are being distributed across England, the government says.
31 Dec 2025
